name: Tofu Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a skillet. Add the diced garlic, onion, bell pepper, carrot, and celery.
2. Season with 2 tablespoons tamari. Cook until the vegetables are tender, then remove from heat and add to a large bowl.
3. Add the mashed tofu to the bowl with the vegetables.
4. Cut the bread into crouton-sized pieces. Quick fry in 1 tablespoon oil with tamari, garlic powder, and nutritional yeast. Remove and add to the tofu mixture.
5. Season with the remaining ingredients: half teaspoon basil, oregano, and turmeric. Combine well.
6. Transfer the batter to a greased casserole dish. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes.
7. Allow to cool for about 5 minutes, then turn the casserole upside down on a plate. Serve warm with a simple green salad. The loaf is also terrific in sandwiches cold and keeps well in the fridge for several days.
Serves 4 to 6.
